## LibraryData.resolveFileTreeSource() function

Resolves all sub-libraries from a file tree source.

**Signature:**

```typescript
export declare function resolveFileTreeSource(source: ILibraryFileTreeSource): Result<ReadonlyArray<IResolvedSubLibrarySource>>;
```
